title: hieracium neorepandum
intro: Hieracium neorepandum, also known as New Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Hieracium neorepandum can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin irritations and wounds.
